name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: River Oaks, TX location of TitleMax Title Loans offers quick title loans at 5060 River Oaks Blvd, open weekdays 10am–7pm and Saturdays 10am–4pm.
description_long:
TitleMax Title Loans at 5060 River Oaks Blvd in River Oaks, TX is a dedicated title loan storefront serving the local community. Open Monday through Friday from 10am to 7pm and Saturday from 10am to 4pm (closed Sundays), this location provides convenient hours for working professionals and weekend shoppers in the River Oaks area.

At this River Oaks branch, you can secure a title loan quickly using your vehicle as collateral. The staff at 817-378-0355 can discuss your loan amount, repayment terms, and required documentation before you visit, helping you prepare for the fastest possible approval process.

Residents of River Oaks looking for fast cash against their vehicle should bring a valid government ID, proof of income, and documentation of vehicle ownership and insurance. TitleMax specializes in title-based lending for those who need immediate funds.
address: 5060 River Oaks Blvd, River Oaks, TX 76114

pricing.guarantee_details: No money-back guarantee applies. This is a lending product — funds are disbursed as loan proceeds and are subject to repayment with interest.

pros: No credit check required — borrowers with bad credit or no credit history can qualify
No bank account required, making it accessible to unbanked consumers
Same-day funding in as little as 30 minutes after approval
Loan amounts up to ~$25,000 based on vehicle appraisal value
Borrower keeps and drives the vehicle throughout the entire loan term
Approximately 900 store locations across 13 states with in-store, online, and phone application options
Multiple loan products available: title loans, motorcycle loans, title pawns, personal loans, and a revolving line of credit
cons: CFPB enforcement actions in 2016 ($9M penalty) and 2023 ($10M penalty + $5.05M consumer redress) for misleading practices and Military Lending Act violations
Interest rates can exceed 36% MAPR — among the highest-cost consumer lending products available
Defaulting borrowers face vehicle repossession, potentially losing their only transportation
Only available in 13 states — not accessible to the majority of U.S. consumers
Additional state-level regulatory penalties in Pennsylvania ($1.6M), California ($25K), and Illinois ($527K+) raise concerns about compliance practices
best_for: Vehicle owners with bad or no credit who need emergency cash within hours and have exhausted lower-cost options
Unbanked consumers who cannot meet the requirements of traditional personal loan lenders or credit unions
Borrowers who own a paid-off or nearly paid-off vehicle and need to access its equity quickly
Consumers in one of the 13 states TitleMax operates who need amounts ranging from a few hundred to several thousand dollars
diagnosis: TitleMax is most appropriate for consumers with poor credit, no bank account, and a vehicle they own outright who face a genuine cash emergency and cannot qualify elsewhere. The critical caveat is that TitleMax's loan costs are extremely high — rates confirmed by federal regulators to exceed 36% MAPR in some cases — and a documented pattern of enforcement actions including over $24 million in CFPB penalties suggests systemic compliance issues. Borrowers who can access a credit union PAL, CDFI, or community lender should do so first.
services: Car title loans (secured, up to ~$25,000 based on vehicle value)
Motorcycle title loans (secured, motorcycle as collateral)
Title pawns (available at Georgia store locations only)
Unsecured personal loans / signature loans (up to $2,500, no collateral required)
Personal line of credit (revolving credit product)
Customer web portal (balance, due dates, payment history)
Mobile app for account management (iOS and Android)
meta_description: River Oaks, TX – TitleMax Title Loans at 5060 River Oaks Blvd for quick title loans.
